narrative:
Pickaway Twp township has 1,566 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
